\tzpentry{ID11378}{Scale-Radius Hubble Rate}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The Hubble rate is the logarithmic derivative of the scale radius of the cosmic hypersphere.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
H(t)=\frac{\dot R(t)}{R(t)}
